parameters.content:
RE-09: Telegram Command Hub

Main user-facing interface. Authorized users
send /commands to manage the RE operations system.
Commands: /help /today /lead /newleads /hotleads
/unassigned /appointments /agentload /exceptions
/search /status /reassign /approve /pause /resume

parameters.jsCode: // Build /help response const data = $input.first().json; const helpText = `RE Operations Command Hub Dashboard: /today - Today's summary (leads, appointments, deals) /status - System health overview Leads: /newleads - New leads (last 24h) /hotleads - Hot-tier leads requiring attention /unassigned - Unassigned leads /lead [id] - View specific lead details /search [query] - Search leads/properties Agents: /agentload - Agent workload overview /reassign [lead_id] [agent_id] - Reassign a lead /pause [agent_id] - Pause agent (set unavailable) /resume [agent_id] - Resume agent (set available) Operations: /appointments [date] - View appointments /exceptions - Open exceptions/escalations /approve [id] - Approve pending action Documents: /senddocs [lead_id] [buyer|seller] - Send document pack Other: /help - This message`; return { json: { response: helpText, chat_id: data.chat_id, } };
